multiCurrency.title: Multi-Currency Transaction
multiCurrency.description: Since you're receiving in {{incomeCurrency}} but your account is in {{accountCurrency}}, you can specify the exact amount credited to your account (after conversions/fees).
multiCurrency.amountPlaceholder: e.g. How many {{currency}} were actually credited
multiCurrency.helper: Optional: The system will calculate the effective exchange rate automatically
multiCurrency.exampleText: If you received USD 100 from freelance work and were credited ARS 157,500 (at 1575 ARS/USD rate), enter 157500 here. The system will calculate the effective rate automatically.

success.redirectingIn: Redirecting to incomes list in {{seconds}} second{{seconds, plural, one {} other {s}}}...

noAccount.title: No Active Account
noAccount.description: Please select or create an account first

empty.title: No Incomes Yet
empty.description: Start tracking your incomes by adding one

tooltips.description: A brief description of the income. For example: 'Salary', 'Freelance', 'Sale'.
tooltips.amount: The amount you received. You can use decimals (e.g., 5000.00).
tooltips.currency: The currency you received the income in. If it's different from your account's main currency, it will be automatically converted.
tooltips.date: The date when you received the income. Default is today, but you can change it if it was on another day.
tooltips.category: Categories help you organize your income and see where it comes from. For example: Salary, Freelance, Investments.
tooltips.familyMember: If this is a family account, you can assign the income to a specific member to know who received it.
